issues.description: Action should be 'PlayFromHand' or similar play action, not 'SearchDeck'. The card plays from trash, not searches deck.
Missing 'source' parameter specifying 'trash' as the zone to play from.
Filter is incomplete. Must include cardType filter for 'Character' and exclusion for '[Dr. Hogback]'.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' is incorrect. The card text specifies one effect '[On K.O.]' with a restriction on Trigger type (other than Dr. Hogback), not two separate triggers.
'destination' should not be 'board' for a play action; remove or use 'play' semantics instead.
